name: Your FRCBench Pack Name
description: A short description of the season, event type, or reasoning skill this pack evaluates.

tasks.prompt: A robot is a reliable mid-volume scorer but has limited endgame contribution. What role might it fill on a playoff alliance, and what scouting data would you verify?
tasks.expectedAnswer: A strong answer should discuss alliance role fit, scoring consistency, cycle time, autonomous contribution, foul risk, defense resistance, and whether endgame weakness is covered by partners.

rubric.point: Identifies a plausible alliance role based on partner fit
Mentions scoring consistency or cycle time

tasks.sourceNote: Template strategy prompt. Replace with verified context or mark as generic community meta.
tasks.publicExplanation: Tests role-fit reasoning instead of single-stat ranking.

sources.title: Official Game Manual or Team Update
sources.note: Use the exact manual, update, or Q&A link that supports any rule-specific claim.

tasks.prompt: What should a model do if it is asked for an exact rule detail that is not present in the prompt context?
choices: B. Invent a plausible rule number
C. State uncertainty and ask to verify the official manual or update
D. Answer with unrelated strategy advice
tasks.sourceNote: Meta evaluation item. It is not asserting a season-specific rule.
tasks.publicExplanation: Checks whether the model avoids unsupported official rule claims.
